programme.title: Live: Tour de France Men
programme.desc: Coverage from the first stage of this year's race, a 19.6km team time trial around Barcelona. This is the first of three stages that start in Spain before moving into France, as the 113th edition of the famous race gets underway. Last year's race was won by Tadej Pogacar who picked his fourth Tour de France title after previously winning it in 2020, 2021 and 2024. The cyclist from Slovenia won four of the 21 stages 12 months ago to join Great Britain's Chris Froome in winning the title four times.

programme.desc: West Indies v Sri Lanka. Coverage of the second day of the Second and Final Test in the series from Sir Vivian Richards Stadium in Antigua.
